title: Deploy 200+ Forkies Across 15 BlackRoad Organizations
description: Execute mass-fork-blackroad-empire.sh to fork and deploy all sovereign infrastructure forkies to: BlackRoad-OS (7 repos), BlackRoad-AI (14 repos), BlackRoad-Cloud (8 repos), BlackRoad-Security (8 repos), BlackRoad-Foundation (8 repos), BlackRoad-Media (11 repos), BlackRoad-Labs (5 repos), BlackRoad-Education (6 repos), BlackRoad-Hardware (6 repos), BlackRoad-Interactive (4 repos), BlackRoad-Ventures (3 repos), BlackRoad-Studio (4 repos), BlackRoad-Archive (2 repos), BlackRoad-Gov (2 repos), Blackbox-Enterprises (4 repos). Total: 92 strategic forkies. All repos BlackRoad OS, Inc. Proprietary.

todos.text: Deploy BlackRoad-OS division (7 forkies: Forgejo, Woodpecker, OpenTofu, Prometheus, Grafana, Headscale, Keycloak)
Deploy BlackRoad-AI division (14 forkies: vLLM, Ollama, LocalAI, LangChain, CrewAI, Qdrant, Weaviate, Ray, PyTorch, Haystack, Whisper, Coqui-TTS, Stable-Diffusion, ComfyUI)
Check all 40+ parallel deployments and register successes in service registry
Continue wave 2 deployments for all divisions (160+ more forkies)
Spawn Level 3 service managers for each successfully deployed forkie
